author: somnergy
content:
New release of Zilkworm (alpha-2)
- Identical full block and EEST paths with unifiedRLP format
- Full EEST runs for all 4 env: x86_64 native, SP1 Hypercube executor, rv64-qemu, rv32-qemu  
- EVMOne updates and initial Amsterdam support
- Faster MPT post-check

Read more in the release notes
https://github.com/erigontech/zilkworm/releases/tag/v0.1.0-alpha.2
